name: event-stream Bitcoin Wallet Stealer (Copay)
description: Malicious flatmap-stream dependency added to event-stream targets Copay bitcoin wallet, harvesting accounts with >100 BTC.

affected_packages.name: event-stream
affected_packages.note: Compromised by social engineering - attacker gained maintainer access.

affected_packages.name: flatmap-stream
affected_packages.note: Entirely malicious package targeting Copay bitcoin wallet.

remediation: Remove event-stream@3.3.6 and upgrade to 4.0.0 or downgrade to 3.3.5
If using Copay wallet: transfer all funds to a new wallet immediately
Rotate any cryptocurrency private keys that were on the system
